desc: Fix the greedy word-wrap bug in `wrapText` inside the large file src/wrap.ts. The width comparison is off by one, so words that should fit on the current line are pushed to the next line and exact-width lines wrap prematurely. Edit only the faulty function so tests/wrap.test.ts passes. Do not rewrite the whole file; src/casing.ts and src/table.ts already pass.
